arts.ttl: Why isn't Crystal Palace vs Chelsea on TV? How to watch Premier League match in UK
arts.sum: Chelsea travel east to London rivals Crystal Palace on Saturday afternoon, but fans not attending the match are out of luck if wanting to watch on TV

arts.ttl: Chelsea have already made transfer decision to replace Wesley Fofana amid huge injury blow
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has already responded to Chelsea's latest major injury blow, which may involve Wesley Fofana missing the rest of the 2024/25 season. "It is hamstring and unfortunately, we are going to lose him for a while." Though Badiashile may return next month, that is two key defensive absentees that Chelsea have to contend with and therefore it looks as though Maresca is taking no time to add needed depth.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Chelsea: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea travel to Crystal Palace for their first outing of 2025. Preview includes TV & live stream details, team news, predicted lineups, score prediction & more.

arts.ttl: Premier League GW20 predictions: Man United to stun Liverpool, Arsenal & Chelsea to lose
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on The Slow Readers Club bassist James Ryan for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 20 of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star Wesley Fofana could be out for the rest of the season following hamstring injury in blow to Blues' top-four hopes
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: With Benoit Badiashile also out until at least February, the defensive problems are mounting for Maresca after losing to Ipswich and Fulham and drawing with Everton.

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca backs Levi Colwill to be future captain as Tosin Adarabioyo answers leader call
arts.sum: The young defender is stepping up as elder statesman Tosin make his presence known

arts.ttl: Chelsea cannot recall Trevoh Chalobah from Crystal Palace loan as Enzo Maresca considers options
arts.sum: Other loans could be cut short amid injury issues

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace team news: Cheick Doucoure set to fill void left by injured midfielder Will Hughes
arts.sum: “Adam [Wharton] won’t be available with Stockport, Leicester and West Ham for the three-game week,” said Glasner. The midfielder, who captained the side in the absence of Marc Guehi against Southampton, suffered a foot injury, even though he played through the majority of the second half.

arts.ttl: ‘We’ve found our targets already’ - Crystal Palace boss Glasner on January transfer window
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner has stated the desire to sign two players this month while avoiding speaking directly on any names. We can’t and won’t, but we are looking for players who fit into our system.

arts.ttl: Glasner on Doucouré start and Riad & França recoveries
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says Cheick Doucouré’s ‘moment has come’, with the 24-year-old midfielder set to start Crystal Palace’s opening match of 2025 against Chelsea.
